english translation text: SHAAHE KHURASAN KA ATA JANAZA HAI YEThe funeral of the king of Khorasan is comingEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
SHAAHE KHURASAN KA ATA JANAZA HAI YEPITO SAR AHLE AZA ATA JANAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The funeral of the king of Khorasan is coming,
O lovers of Imam Reza (a.s.), mourn as his coffin is approaching

urdu transliteration text:
FATEMA KE GHAR SE YEH NIKLA YE TABUT HAIRO’O AEY AHLE AZA ATA JANAAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
This funeral has come out of the house of Bibi Fatima (s.a.),
The lovers of Imam Reza (a.s.) are crying, the coffin is approaching

urdu transliteration text:
SHEHIE KHURASAN MAI MARE GAYE SHAHEDEENWIRAA MADINA HUWA ATA JANAAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The upholder of the religion has been martyred in Khorasan,
The city of Medina has become desolate, the coffin is approaching

urdu transliteration text:
AHLE FALAK SAATH HAIN SAR KHULE JIBRIL HAISHAUR YEHI HAI BAPA ATA JANAAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The angels are here and Jibrail is grieving,
It is being said that the coffin is approaching

urdu transliteration text:
MAMUN MALAWN NE ZEHR DIYA SHAH KOROTE HAI AAJ MUSTAFA ATA JANAAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Mamoon (the king) poisoned the Imam (a.s.),
The Prophet (pbuh) is weeping today, the coffin is approaching

urdu transliteration text:
ROTI HAI SAR PIT’TI ZAHRA HAY HAMRAH CHALIMATAM KARO SHEH KE BAPA  ATA JANAZA HAI YE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Bibi Zahra (s.a) is also weeping and walking along,
Do matam of Imam Reza (a.s.), the coffin is approaching
